name: Treaty on Uniform Nomenclature
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>同</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>同</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>名</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>同</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>盟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>条</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Treaty of the League of Uniform Nomenclature
desc:
If you control 2 or more face-up monsters with the same name, except Tokens: Apply this effect, depending on how many you control.
● Exactly 2: Destroy 1 Spell/Trap Card your opponent controls.
● Exactly 3: Destroy all Spell/Trap Cards your opponent controls.
